title: Iran war could trigger ‘substantial stagflationary shock’, warns EU economy chief
summary_full: “Obviously, the economic impact will depend much on the duration and the regional wideness of the conflict,” EU Economy Commissioner Valdis Dombrovskis said
summary_public: “Obviously, the economic impact will depend much on the duration and the regional wideness of the conflict,” EU Economy Commissioner Valdis Dombrovskis said
